case_title: BLOCK 6 JOINT VENTURE LLC VS. DAVID DEGAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BLOCK 6 JOINT VENTURE LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEGAN, DAVID THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 299 FREMONT STREET, UNIT #3203, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94105, COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLOCK 6 JOINT VENTURE LLC SERVED OCT-15-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DEGAN, DAVID
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO V, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE [$134.13 PER DAY] FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLOCK 6 JOINT VENTURE LLC
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT DEGAN, DAVID
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT DEGAN, DAVID
DECLARATION RE: LOST ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT, THREE DAY NOTICE AND PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLOCK 6 JOINT VENTURE LLC

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLOCK 6 JOINT VENTURE LLC AS TO DEFENDANT DEGAN, DAVID DOES 1 TO V, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BLOCK 6 JOINT VENTURE LLC AS TO DEFENDANT DEGAN, DAVID
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT DEGAN, DAVID
